sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115364" key="yata=sqai" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψατᾶσθαι·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">προκαταλαμβάνειν,</foreign> Id.: <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψατῆσαι·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">προειπεῖν,</foreign> Id.
